name: Peking Shrimp Ball
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound medium shrimp, shelled, deveined and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg white until foamy.
2. In a bowl, blend together the dry sherry, cornstarch, salt, and grated ginger.
3. Stir the mixture into the beaten egg white.
4. Add the chopped water chestnuts and shrimp; mix well.
5. Heat water in a pan to simmering.
6. With oil-coated hands, roll the shrimp filling into walnut-sized balls.
7. Drop the balls into the simmering water one at a time.
8. Simmer gently until they float to the surface (about four to five minutes).
9. Drain and discard the liquid.
10. If made ahead, cool, cover, and refrigerate for up to 2 days.
